# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

# .gitlab-ci.yml
image: docker:latest
services:
  - docker:dind
stages:
  - build
  - deploy
variables:
  GIT_DEPLOY_KEY: $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.deploy_key
  GIT_USERNAME: $CI_REGISTRY_USER
  GIT_PASSWORD: $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD
  REGISTRY_URL: $CI_REGISTRY

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - docker build -t my-image .
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - Dockerfile
      - my-image.tar

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - echo $GIT_DEPLOY_KEY | docker login $REGISTRY_URL --username $GIT_USERNAME --password-stdin
    - docker push $REGISTRY_URL/my-image:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
  tags:
    - deploy
